proposal_summary: This proposal seeks to allocate 125,000 $ARB tokens to retroactively reward 25 early community contributors known as 'Arbiters' for their efforts in the Arbitrum ecosystem between 2021 and 2023.

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum DAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: establishing a transparent and fair reward system through the Arbitrum DAO

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Recognize and reward the outstanding contributions of the Arbitrum community members known as 'Arbiter'.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: This proposal proposes to allocate 125,000 $ARB tokens, equal to 0.00125% of the total supply, to recognize and reward the outstanding contributions of the Arbitrum community member known as 'Arbiter'.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal involves a straightforward allocation and distribution of a fixed amount of tokens to a specific group of contributors.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal proposes to allocate 125,000 $ARB tokens... agreed on an equal share of the reward amount.

limitations: The proposal text does not provide specific wallet addresses for the recipients or the treasury.
No smart contract execution details or functions are disclosed.
